text: To be honest, this is one of my favourite ytpmv collabs.  I always find that a lot of collabs have those one or two parts that are just dumb and lower the overall greatness of the entire collab (cough funkytown collab.. i mean I'm not saying the entire thing was bad it's a great collab, just those couple of parts) and it's nice to finally run into a collab without that sorta thing. :) Glad to see collabs aren't entirely dead :D

text:
It's whatever. I was being dumb in the first place but thanks. 
Also MrSpazzaneve if you want you can clean up the yucky comments. I'd almost prefer it really.
author: @TheEpicROB

text:
I didn't mean for it to be anything more than a dicky comment overall though. I was in the wrong from the beginning but I didn't intend for it to escalate to a nasty level. So sorry for the whole ordeal and hopefully none of you will hold this against me.  
On a final note I'd like to compliment the people who did put effort into this as I did find some of it actually interesting unlike my other comment states.
author: @TheEpicROB

text:
I guess I'd just like to leave an overall apology on here.
I was just getting sick of seeing an abundance of chiptune collabs with roughly the same people and a focus on covering the song with nothing really too interesting other than that. Just to explain my motives of my initial comment. When I received replys I became rather apathetic in explaining myself so I just kind of responded with offensive nothingness which didn't help my case.
author: @TheEpicROB
